title: orthosporum bonus-henricus
intro: Orthosporum bonus-henricus, also known as the Yellow Beggartick, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Orthosporum bonus-henricus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
